event: BTC-e founded; begins operations with no KYC/AML requirements
Mt. Gox stolen BTC laundered through BTC-e via Vinnik-controlled wallets
Silk Road seized by FBI; BTC-e remains primary darknet off-ramp
Mt. Gox declares bankruptcy; BTC-e continues processing stolen funds
AlphaBay seized by international law enforcement
Alexander Vinnik arrested in Halkidiki Greece on U.S. warrant
DOJ unseals indictment; FinCEN issues $110M + $12M penalties
WEX launches as BTC-e successor with cloned codebase
WEX goes offline permanently; user funds unrecoverable
Vinnik extradited from Greece to France
Vinnik convicted in France sentenced to 5 years
